name: sonicwall_firewall
explanation: SonicWall Firewall is a logs-only vendor tile. The spec defines only a logs template (UDP syslog listener with a user-supplied port) and there is no Agent metric check — the datadog_checks package contains no check.py, just package metadata. Setup requires the operator to enable Datadog logs, choose a UDP port, and configure SonicWall to forward syslog to that port. None of that is wire-discoverable, and the integration is not an Agent dispatched check at all.
notes: Pattern N analogue: logs/syslog-only integration with no Agent check. The user must pick a UDP port and configure the device to forward to it; auto-config in the network-probe sense does not apply.
